# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

function buildAdminReport(PDO $pdo, array $post): array
{
    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    $status = isset($post['status']) ? trim((string)$post['status']) : '';
    $category = isset($post['category']) ? trim((string)$post['category']) : '';
    $dateFrom = isset($post['date_from']) ? trim((string)$post['date_from']) : '';
    $dateTo = isset($post['date_to']) ? trim((string)$post['date_to']) : '';

    $sql = "SELECT id, title, status, category, created_at, updated_at
            FROM reports
            WHERE 1=1";

    if ($status !== '' && $status !== 'all') {
        $where[] = "status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $status;
    }

    if ($category !== '' && $category !== 'all') {
        $where[] = "category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $category;
    }

    if ($dateFrom !== '') {
        $dtFrom = date_create($dateFrom);
        if ($dtFrom !== false) {
            $where[] = "created_at >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $dtFrom->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }

    if ($dateTo !== '') {
        $dtTo = date_create($dateTo);
        if ($dtTo !== false) {
            $where[] = "created_at <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $dtTo->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }

    if (!empty($where)) {
        $sql .= " AND " . implode(" AND ", $where);
    }

    $sql .= " ORDER BY created_at DESC";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $stmt->execute();

    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
    if (!empty($where)) {
        $countSql .= " AND " . implode(" AND ", $where);
    }

    $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $countStmt->execute();
    $total = (int)$countStmt->fetchColumn();

    return [
        'total' => $total,
        'data' => $rows,
        'sql' => $sql,
        'params' => $params,
    ];
}

function renderAdminReport(PDO $pdo): void
{
    $report = buildAdminReport($pdo, $_POST);

    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
    echo json_encode($report, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
}
